leaderboard.noRankingsDesc: They are automatically generated when competition results are recorded.
leaderboard.unrankedDesc: Participate in competitions to appear in the ranking.
leaderboard.eloDescription: Each player has a level from 1.0 (beginner) to 7.0 (professional), automatically calculated based on club competition results.
leaderboard.defaultStart: All players start at 4.0 (intermediate level). Your level goes up or down based on match results.
leaderboard.keyFactor: The key: it matters who you win or lose against
leaderboard.goUpLot: You go up a lot if you beat someone with a higher level than you.
leaderboard.goUpLittle: You go up a little if you beat someone with a lower level.
leaderboard.goDownLot: You go down a lot if you lose to someone with a lower level.
leaderboard.goDownLittle: You go down a little if you lose to someone with a higher level.
leaderboard.doubles: In padel (doubles), the team level is the average of both players.
leaderboard.stabilityDesc: The first matches adjust your level more quickly. As you play more matches, changes become more gradual and your level stabilises.

hero.subtitle: Bookings, members, competitions and payments in a single platform. Designed for clubs that want to leave behind WhatsApp, Excel and paper.
hero.trustLine: No credit card · No lock-in · Set up in 5 minutes

socialProof.item1Desc: Create your club, add courts and start receiving bookings today
socialProof.item2Desc: Your players book, pay and join matches without calling
socialProof.item3Desc: Stripe integrated so you collect online without chasing anyone
socialProof.item4Desc: Bookings, members, competitions and payments in one place

painPoints.title: Sound familiar?
painPoints.subtitle: If you manage your club with WhatsApp, Excel or paper, we know exactly what you're going through.
painPoints.item1Before: Late-night messages, double bookings, constant misunderstandings.
painPoints.item1After: 24/7 online bookings. No calls, no errors, no drama.
painPoints.item2Before: Manual brackets, lost results, standings nobody understands.
painPoints.item3Before: One spreadsheet for members, another for payments, WhatsApp to communicate.
painPoints.item3After: Everything unified: members, bookings, payments and communication.

features.title: Everything your club needs. Nothing it doesn't.
features.subtitle: 8 essential tools for your club's daily management. No unnecessary modules, no extra complexity.
features.bookingsDesc: Your members book from their phone anytime. Overlap detection and automatic confirmation.
features.membersDesc: Complete profiles, bulk import from Excel and direct communication. Goodbye paper lists.
features.competitionsDesc: Generate brackets, record results and publish standings. All calculated and visible to your players.
features.paymentsDesc: Online payment with Stripe or pay at the desk on arrival. Configure by court and time slot.
features.portalDesc: Bookings, open matches, competitions and profile. No download needed, works from the browser.
features.analyticsDesc: Occupancy per court, revenue, trends and member growth. Real data for real decisions.
features.newsDesc: Share updates, events and promotions directly to your members from your own portal.
features.rolesDesc: Admins, staff and members with differentiated access. Each person sees only what they need.

howItWorks.title: Set up your club in 5 minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: No complicated installations. No training needed. If you know how to use WhatsApp, you know how to use Padel Club OS.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up in 30 seconds with your email. Your club is automatically created with everything ready to go.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Add your courts, set schedules and prices. Import your members from Excel if you already have them.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Share the link with your members. They book from their phone; you relax.

pricing.title: Clear pricing. No surprises.
pricing.subtitle: While others make you call sales to find out the price, we tell you right here.

starter.desc: For small clubs starting to go digital.

pro.name: Pro
pro.desc: For growing clubs that need more.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.desc: For large clubs with advanced needs.

comparison.title: Traditional management vs Padel Club OS

testimonials.title: Your club deserves something better
testimonials.subtitle: We know the day-to-day of a padel club. We've designed the solution for each of these problems.
testimonials.item1Before: WhatsApp groups, phone calls and paper notebooks. Double bookings, misunderstandings and hours wasted managing chaos.
testimonials.item1After: 24/7 online bookings with automatic overlap detection. Your members book on their own; you don't touch your phone.
testimonials.item2Before: Leagues in manually updated spreadsheets. Errors, wrong calculations and standings nobody knows where to find.
testimonials.item2After: Generate leagues and tournaments in seconds. Automatic brackets, real-time results and standings visible to everyone.
testimonials.item3Before: WhatsApp for bookings, Excel for competitions, paper for members and another app for payments. Nothing connected, everything duplicated.
testimonials.item3After: A single platform for bookings, members, competitions and analytics. Everything connected, everything in order.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.
faq.q1: How long does it take to set up my club?
faq.a1: Less than 5 minutes. Create your account, add your courts and you can share the link with your members. No installations, no training, no complications.
faq.a2: Not at all. If you know how to use WhatsApp, you know how to use Padel Club OS. The interface is intuitive and designed so anyone at the club can manage it.
faq.q3: Do my players need to download an app?
faq.a3: No. The player portal works directly from the mobile browser, like a regular website. It can also be installed as an app (PWA) without going through app stores.
faq.q4: Can I migrate my current data?
faq.a4: Yes. You can import your member list from an Excel file. Bookings start being managed from the moment you set up the club.
faq.q5: Is there a lock-in or minimum commitment?
faq.a5: No. You can cancel at any time. No penalties, no fine print. Start with 14 free days and decide if it works for you.
faq.q6: What happens when the free trial ends?
faq.a6: Your club stays active but management features are locked until you choose a plan. Nothing is deleted and you can pick up where you left off.

cta.title: Your club can't wait any longer
cta.subtitle: Every day without going digital is a day of lost bookings, frustrated members and wasted hours. Start today. It's free for 14 days.
cta.trustLine: No credit card · Set up in 5 minutes · Cancel anytime

footer.tagline: The management platform for padel clubs in Spain. Modern, accessible and hassle-free.
footer.copyright: Padel Club OS. All rights reserved.

contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with the Padel Club OS team. We're here to help you digitise your padel club.
contact.title: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: Have a question, an idea or just want to know more? We're here to help.
contact.faqSubtitle: We answer the most common questions about Padel Club OS.
contact.basedInDesc: We work remotely from different Spanish cities. Our heart is on the padel courts across the country.
contact.seeInAction: Prefer to see it in action?
contact.seeInActionDesc: Create your account and set up your club in less than 5 minutes. No commitment, no credit card.
contact.faq1Q: How long does it take to set up my club?
contact.faq1A: Less than 5 minutes. Create your account, add your courts and you can start managing bookings. If you need help, our team will guide you through the process.
contact.faq2Q: Can I migrate data from my current system?
contact.faq2A: Yes. We offer bulk member import and can help you migrate your existing data at no extra cost on Pro and Enterprise plans.
contact.faq3Q: Is there a lock-in or minimum commitment?
contact.faq3A: No. All our plans are monthly and you can cancel at any time. No fine print, no penalties.
contact.faq4Q: Do my players need to download an app?
contact.faq4A: No. The player portal works directly from the mobile browser. No downloads, no updates. It works like an app but without the hassle.
contact.faq5Q: Do you offer support in Spanish?
contact.faq5A: Of course. We are a Spanish team and all our support is in Spanish. No English chatbots or automatic translations.

form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help...
form.successDesc: We've received your message. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
form.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters.
form.messageMin: Message must be at least 10 characters.

about.metaDescription: Meet Alberto Bort, the developer behind Padel Club OS.
about.title: Padel clubs deserve software that matches their level
about.subtitle: I'm a web developer and padel player. I saw a problem: club management was still anchored to spreadsheets, WhatsApp and software from the 2000s. I decided to change that.
about.principle1Desc: If something can be done in 2 clicks, it shouldn't need 5. Every screen is designed to be obvious.
about.principle2Desc: Public pricing. No fine print. No lock-in. No sales calls.
about.principle3Desc: Designed with the real needs of Spanish clubs. Native GDPR, in proper Spanish.
about.principle4Desc: Every product decision starts with one question: does this save the club time?
about.designedToSimplifyDesc: Everything you need to manage your club, from day one.
about.joinChangeDesc: Try Padel Club OS free for 14 days and discover how easy it is to manage your club.
about.storyP1: It all started booking courts via WhatsApp. I watched club staff jotting down bookings in notebooks, managing leagues in Excel and answering messages at 11 pm. I knew there had to be a better way.
about.storyQuote: I wanted to build the tool I wish I'd found as a player and that any club could use from day one.
about.storyP2: As a developer specialising in modern web applications and PWAs, I had the tools to do it. That's how Padel Club OS was born: a platform built from scratch for padel clubs in Spain. No forced translations of American software, no golf or tennis features nobody needs. Just the essentials, done right.
about.bioDesc: I build modern web applications and Progressive Web Apps that load fast, work offline and turn visitors into customers. Padel Club OS is the result of combining my technical expertise with my passion for padel.
about.tech2Desc: Works offline, installs like a native app
about.principlesSubtitle: The ideas that guide every decision I make.

switch.metaTitle: Switch from Matchpoint to Padel Club OS
switch.metaDescription: Tired of TPC Matchpoint's limitations? Discover how to migrate to Padel Club OS without losing data and with personalised support.
switch.title: Your club deserves more than Matchpoint
switch.subtitle: We know what it's like to work with rigid software. That's why we've built a modern, flexible alternative designed for padel clubs in Spain.
switch.pain1Desc: A user experience from another decade. Your members deserve a modern app that works on mobile.
switch.pain2Desc: Want to change a schedule or a rate? Good luck. Every adjustment requires calling support.
switch.pain3Desc: You can't make good decisions without data. Matchpoint leaves you blind about occupancy and profitability.
switch.pain4Desc: Hidden fees, lock-in contracts and extra costs for basic features that should be included.
switch.step1Desc: Tell us about your club and we'll show you Padel Club OS in action.
switch.step2Desc: Our team helps you migrate members, courts and settings. No data loss.
switch.step3Desc: Training session so your entire staff masters the platform from day one.
switch.faq1Q: Can I migrate my data from Matchpoint?
switch.faq1A: Yes. We help you migrate members, courts and settings. The process usually takes less than 48 hours.
switch.faq2Q: Is there a lock-in or commitment period?
switch.faq2A: No. Padel Club OS works on a monthly subscription with no lock-in. You can cancel anytime.
switch.faq3A: Future bookings can be migrated. Historical ones are kept in an export for your reference.
switch.faq4Q: How long does the migration take?
switch.faq4A: Usually between 24 and 48 hours. Includes full club setup, member import and training.
switch.faq5A: You get a 14-day free trial. If you're not convinced, you pay nothing. No questions asked.
switch.ctaDesc: Request a demo and discover what your club is missing.
